Style.name: STEPEDITAliases
Style.aliases: L01 Sample;L01 Noise;L01 Pan;L01 Echo;L01 Invert L;L01 Invert R;L02 Sample;L02 Noise;L02 Pan;L02 Echo;L02 Invert L;L02 Invert R;L02 FM;L03 Sample;L03 Noise;L03 Pan;L03 Echo;L03 Invert L;L03 Invert R;L03 FM;L04 Sample;L04 Noise;L04 Pan;L04 Echo;L04 Invert L;L04 Invert R;L04 FM;L05 Sample;L05 Noise;L05 Pan;L05 Echo;L05 Invert L;L05 Invert R;L05 FM;L06 Sample;L06 Noise;L06 Pan;L06 Echo;L06 Invert L;L06 Invert R;L06 FM;L07 Sample;L07 Noise;L07 Pan;L07 Echo;L07 Invert L;L07 Invert R;L07 FM;L08 Sample;L08 Noise;L08 Pan;L08 Echo;L08 Invert L;L08 Invert R;L08 FM;L01 Transpose;L01 Detune;L01 Amp (steps);L02 Transpose;L02 Detune;L02 Amp (steps);L03 Transpose;L03 Detune;L03 Amp (steps);L04 Transpose;L04 Detune;L04 Amp (steps);L05 Transpose;L05 Detune;L05 Amp (steps);L06 Transpose;L06 Detune;L06 Amp (steps);L07 Transpose;L07 Detune;L07 Amp (steps);L08 Transpose;L08 Detune;L08 Amp (steps);Voice Detune;Voice Transpose;Voice Amplitude;Delay Dry Mix;Delay Wet Mix;Delay Time;Delay Feedback;Delay Dry Pan;Delay Wet Pan
